title.en: China-to-Croatia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入克罗地亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入克羅地亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Croatia (HZN/HERA/HOPS) expectations: HZN-adopted standards routes, HERA and HOPS/HEP-ODS grid-connection processes, CE-marking-aligned requirements, IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence, with 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings and Rijeka as the main port — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与克罗地亚（HZN/HERA/HOPS）要求的对照，包括HZN采用路径、HERA/HOPS并网审查、EU CE一致性证据、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤岛和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 证据；并考虑230/400 V、50 Hz电网与里耶卡主要港口，与中国 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 和 GB/T 19964 基准比较。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與克羅地亞（HZN/HERA/HOPS）要求的對照，包括HZN採用路徑、HERA/HOPS併網審查、EU CE一致性證據、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤島和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 證據；並考慮230/400 V、50 Hz 電網與里耶卡主要港口，與中國 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 和 GB/T 19964 基準比較。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, standards determination, grid-operator approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Croatia (HZN/HERA/HOPS) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、标准裁定、并网审批、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行克罗地亚（HZN/HERA/HOPS）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、標準裁定、併網核准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行克羅地亞（HZN/HERA/HOPS）要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Croatia, practical gaps are: confirm the applicable HZN route and project-level approval path; validate that IEC 62109-1/-2 safety testing, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC documentation are accepted for Croatian installations; and prove 230/400 V 50 Hz performance, protection thresholds, reconnection timing, and commissioning records for HOPS/HEP-ODS-connected projects. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 documents are useful but not automatically interchangeable with Croatian evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口克罗地亚时，主要差距包括：确认HZN适用路径与项目级审批，核实IEC 62109-1/-2 安全型式试验、IEC 62116 防孤岛、IEC 61727 并网接口和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据是否被克罗地亚项目接受，并验证230/400 V 50 Hz下的保护阈值、重连延迟和调试记录；中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 与 GB/T 19964证据不能自动替代克罗地亚证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口克羅地亞時，主要差距包括：確認HZN適用路徑與專案級審核，核實IEC 62109-1/-2 安全型式試驗、IEC 62116 防孤島、IEC 61727 並網介面和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據是否被克羅地亞專案接受，並驗證230/400 V 50 Hz下的保護閾值、重連延遲和調試記錄；中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 與 GB/T 19964證據不能自動替代克羅地亞證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
